title: Pinterest (PINS) Stock Price & Overview - Stock Analysis
text: Pinterest (PINS) is a visual discovery and shopping platform with over 600 million monthly active users globally. The company generates revenue primarily through advertising and has been undergoing significant transformation to become an AI-powered shopping assistant. Recent quarterly results show revenue growth acceleration with Q1 2026 reaching $1.008 billion (18% growth). The company benefits from high intent user searches, with over 80 billion searches conducted monthly. Pinterest's Performance+ AI advertising product has become increasingly important to revenue growth, representing about 30% of lower-funnel revenue. The stock has recovered significantly following Q1 earnings beat, though it remains down year-to-date. Key metrics to watch include monthly active user growth (currently 631 million, up 11% YoY), average revenue per user, and Performance+ adoption rates among advertisers. The company is also diversifying revenue streams through the tvScientific acquisition, which adds connected TV advertising capabilities. Analyst consensus remains bullish with an average price target of $26.78.
